owner_operator_stated: Family-owned practice led by Dr. Michael Teuscher and his three sons (Brayden, Riley, Jameson); the family has practiced dentistry since 1985, with the St. Charles location established in 2015.
notes: Corroborated by exact phone match ((630) 762-0000). The site's listed address (40W131 Campton Crossings Drive, St. Charles) differs from this record's address (40W320 Lafox Rd) -- appears to be a relocation of the same family-owned practice (a Yahoo Local listing still shows the old Lafox Rd address under 'Teuscher Dental Group'), not an ownership change. Vendor hint 'andreaadamdds.com' was not corroborated by address or phone and was not used. No /careers page found (404 on teuscherdental.com/careers); no hiring content on homepage.

owner_operator_stated: st-charlesdental.com presents 'St. Charles Dental' at 2455 Dean St as part of the multi-location 'Partners In Care' group (with Elmhurst Dental and others), co-owned by Dr. Groh and Dr. Smith who practice full time at the Elmhurst and St. Charles offices; but the phone listed there ((630) 377-7760) does not match this record's phone.
notes: Named entity 'Elmhurst Dental Group DBA St. Charles Dental' name-matches st-charlesdental.com (2455 Dean St, Unit E), but that site's phone (630-377-7760) does not match this record's phone (630-377-3630). Independent listings (Yelp, CareCredit) show 630-377-3630 belongs to a DIFFERENT practice, 'Gentle Touch Dental Care', in Suite D of the same 2455 Dean St building -- whose own website (gentletouchdentalstcharles.com, the vendor hint) is now suspended/dead, so it could not itself be corroborated. Two different dental practices occupy different suites at the same street address; treat as an ownership/identity conflict rather than a clean match. St. Charles Dental is part of the 9-location 'Partners In Care' group.

Address (298 West North Avenue Suite 4) and phone ((630) 530-9000) both confirmed exact match on the practice's own site. Site does not name any dentists (a 'Meet The Doctors' nav link 404s) and has no careers/hiring page.

owner_operator_stated: villaparkdentalil.com identifies Dr. Sameera Jagirdar as the owner/dentist operating at 413 W Saint Charles, Villa Park, IL -- the same address and phone number as this record, but under a different practice name than 'Handcrafted Smiles'.
notes: This record's exact address (413 W Saint Charles Rd, Villa Park) AND exact phone ((630) 629-3120) both now belong to 'Villa Park Dentistry' (Dr. Sameera Jagirdar), a different practice name than the record's 'Handcrafted Smiles'. Yelp's Handcrafted Smiles listing at this address is marked CLOSED. Handcrafted Smiles' current site (handcraftedsmilesil.com) now lists only an Arlington Heights location with no Villa Park location, consistent with a closure/rebrand/successor at this address. Vendor hint 'dentalmaxdds.com' was not tested (unrelated to either entity found).

The practice's own registered domain (westchicagodentalcare.com) failed to load (TLS certificate error, ERR_TLS_CERT_ALTNAME_INVALID) and could not be verified directly. Address (166 W Washington St) and phone ((630) 520-9030) were both confirmed exact match on the practice's PatientConnect365-hosted directory microsite, which functions as its web presence. No doctor names or hiring info found there or on its Facebook page. Vendor hint 'myfirstdentalvisit.com' appears to belong to a DIFFERENT, similarly-named practice ('Aurora and West Chicago Dental Care') and was not used for corroboration.

owner_operator_stated: Family-owned practice founded by Dr. Dennis J. Beck in 1982, continuing his late father Dr. James G. Beck's Wheaton dental practice (1955-1976); current providers are Dennis J. Beck DDS, Nicole Beck Rogers DDS, and Mark J. Beck DMD.
notes: Address (223 W Illinois St, Wheaton) and phone ((630) 668-4500) both confirmed exact match on the practice's own site. Independent, family-owned practice spanning three generations of the Beck family.
